reviews.comment:
Visited Coffee Island and tried their open chicken puff, chicken roll, hot chocolate, and latte. The open chicken puff was crisp and flavourful, while the chicken roll made for a satisfying snack.

The hot chocolate was comforting and well balanced, and the latte was smooth with a good coffee to milk ratio.
Overall, it was a nice spot for a quick bite and coffee break, with a calm and relaxed vibe that makes you want to sit a little longer. Definitely a good place to drop by when you’re craving something warm and

reviewReply.comment: We’re glad you enjoyed the food, hot chocolate, and latte, and that the calm vibe made it a relaxing stop. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.

reviews.comment: The coffee was really good. We ordered one Kenya single estate and one Kenya Blend. Both were great. The Kenya single estate is a great coffee for anyone who likes the strong coffee aftertaste. The gelato was good too. The brownie was ok. The service was excellent!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you for the detailed feedback! We’re glad you enjoyed both the Beans, and that the gelato and service stood out. We appreciate your honest note on the brownie as well. Looking forward to welcoming you again soon.
